data.description: V,S, (holy or M water powdered silver and iron)

Casting Time: 1 action
Shimmering energy surrounds and protects you from
Range: Self
fey, undead, creatures originating from beyond the Plane. Fey, fiends, and undead have disadvantage on attack rolls against you.
V You can end the spell by either the
Material following special functions.
Break Enchantment. As your action, you touch a
creature that is charmed, frightened, or possessed by celestial, elemental, fey, a fiend, an
undead. The creature is no longer charmed, or
frightened, possessed by such creatures.
Dismissal. Your melee attack against celestial,
an elemental, fey, a fiend, an undead can hit, and attempt to drive the target home. On a
hit, the spell ends.
Cancels one or more magic effects.

Your spell empowers with radiance. Until you end the spell, weapon attacks deal an extra 1d4 radiant damage. You can also choose a creature, object, or magical item within range to be affected by this spell's effect. Any of lower level spells have no effect on any target. For spells of 3rd or higher level, each level higher grants you the ability to use your spellcasting ability check to end the effects of another spell on one target. At Higher Levels. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of a higher level, you can automatically end the effects of a spell on the target if its level is equal to or less than the level of the spell you are casting.

This spell allows you to communicate with a deity, spirit, or other supernatural entity through an offering and a single question about a specific event, activity, goal, or another matter within days. The contacted entity provides a truthful reply, which might be in the form of a short rhyme, omen, or cryptic phrase. While the DM does not take into account any possible changes to the outcome due to spells or circumstances that could affect it, if you cast this spell two or more times before finishing the initial casting, the DM makes a secret roll to determine a random reading.

You touch a willing creature of your choice that you can see within range, and it gains the benefit of one of the following effects (your choice): 

* You end all of its diseases and cures any number of debilitating conditions afflicting it. A debilitating condition includes exhaustion, poison, or a similar affliction.
* You grant the target advantage on saving throws against three different types of damage (acid, cold, fire, lightning, necrotic, psychic, radiant, thunder) for one hour.

You speak a word with power that is imbued with divine energy and shaped to create the dawn of creation. Choose any number of creatures you can see within range. Each creature must make a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, each affected creature suffers an effect as if it were hit by a ray of the *disintegrate* spell.
